message: Jake
Fabar
The film crew had started filming again.
Hey, how's it going?
Thanks for asking.
You seem a bit tired, huh?
Geez, it's really a problem. No one comes to shoot properly. I can't figure out what these modern agents are thinking.
Hey.
I was just bored alone.

Again, there are no standout actors, and it seems the director finds this shoot unworthy.
The rest of the staff are busily working.
It's like this place has become a different space.
There seem to be many things not going as planned, and it looks like it's really taking a toll on him.
If only there were a good story, it might brighten up his spirits.
I feel like I haven't seen the director's genuine smile in a long time.
At this rate, we can claim penalties.
Penalties? That's true. If we declare the penalties, they might show up more seriously.
By the way, the main actor didn’t show up at the party, did he? My secretary was disappointed.
Ah.
He's stuck in Hollywood for the final shoot of another movie.
Sounds like a tight schedule.
Yeah, since I specifically requested him, I can't complain about putting him under pressure. But if this keeps going on...
Speaking of which, did a woman named Gabriela call?
Yes. As usual, it was a request to find someone.
I see.
Well, both Gabriela and Ginny are in trouble. A wrist being delivered is something else.
A wrist being delivered?
What on earth does that mean?
Huh, didn't Gabriela tell you?!
I thought Gabriela was the one sharing the news.
What about Meryl since then?
What can you do?
I have no clue what she's thinking.
That sounds tough.
Yeah, I've given up on it.
Meryl's been a challenge too.
She's entering a difficult period herself.
It seems like she's feeling that way too.
Yeah, that's right. This is her crucial moment.
I really want Meryl to get through this.
Recently, Jennifer has been in a bad mood.
R-Really?
It's just frustrating, really.
I've seriously gotten tired of it.
Director.
Ah, I don't have any talent for manipulating people.
I just wish she'd get along with Meryl.
Sorry, but I don't want to talk about that right now.
It's not exactly a situation where we can talk about anything.
I just want to throw my hands up and give up.
About Cindy...
I feel bad for you. It seems like Gloria is searching on her own.
Surely, she knows where she is, right?
Even if she doesn't know exactly, she seems to have an idea.
Even if Cindy comes back now, she can't handle the shooting alone.
Ah, this is giving me a headache.
I don't understand her. I have no idea what she's thinking.
She's expressionless.
As Cindy's agent, I need her to do her job a bit better.
Have you heard from Gloria?
No, not at all. She's probably trying to find Cindy on her own.
What's everyone thinking, anyway?
About Guy...
It seems he won't be back for about a month.
What!? How can we film without him for a whole month?
I didn't hear it directly, though.
Then who is saying that?
A BAM reporter, a woman named Eva Courtney.
BAM? I can't trust anything that writer from a third-rate magazine says.
I need Guy to return quickly.
Do you know where Guy has gone? I haven't received a word from him.
I haven't heard anything from him either.
I don't think it's fair to blame you, but please understand we're having a tough time here.
I wonder what will happen with this movie.
Gabriela is a bit of an acquaintance. She said she's in trouble, so I introduced her to you.
I received your call, so I came to meet you.
I see. I'm really sorry for all the issues you're dealing with.
No, I'm actually glad to receive the request.
Well, it's really appreciated that you say that.
Gabriela's going through a rough time too, so please help her out.
I honestly thought that topic would come up, but I guess it didn't.
The wrist is going to be delivered.
What on earth does that mean?
Ginny's.
No, you should probably ask Gabriela for more details.
Gabriela's going to be mad at me.
The director is actually quite a broad-minded person. If I were the director, I wouldn't be able to stay calm in this situation.
Maybe it would be better to just take a vacation and rest properly?
Meryl still hasn't come to filming.
Part of the reason might be that Ariana can't be found.
I think she's having her own set of difficulties, but how long is she planning to continue like this?
Jennifer is really getting the short end of the stick here. The co-stars aren't showing up, and filming isn't progressing.
I start to feel sympathy for her.
The director has a calm work style. They probably have a well-planned schedule, but even so, that must be tough.
I'm not involved, but I'm starting to worry about how this movie will turn out.
Cindy seems to have been missing since then.
However, the fact that it hasn't leaked to the media suggests that Gloria likely knows where she is.
Still, it's not good to neglect work.
I really have no idea about her. Honestly, I don't even want to know.
I guess I'm wandering around looking for Cindy by now.
Was thinking of Guy as a best friend just a delusion?
I don't know anything about him anymore.
I'm curious about the connection between Gabriela and the director.
There's no way the director is one of the clients, right?
I'm also wondering about the relationship between Gabriela and the director.
It seems to be more serious than I thought. I feel like it might be better to rely on the police.
Gabriela didn't tell me something important.
It's about time I take my leave. I'm sorry for being a bother.
Come visit again.
※※※ This is a bug ※※※
